name: skill-architect
description: A meta-skill for scaffolding and validating agentic skills.

INIT.goal: Define the skill purpose and target agent environment.

DESIGN_FLOW.goal: Map the state machine and transition triggers.

DESIGN_PERSONAS.goal: Draft the SKILL.md with phased instructions and personas.

ADVERSARIAL_SIM.goal: Simulate failures and edge cases in a mental sandbox.

CRITIC.goal: Final audit for state-drift and agent-agnosticism.
